news.t: Capital Group Unveils Five New Active ETFs, Including Its First Multi-Asset ETF

holdings.infoBox: CGIE is an equity ETF with a total of 81 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 5.44%, TotalEnergies SE at 3.39%, CAPITAL GROUP CENTRAL CASH FUN CAPITAL GROUP CNTRL CSH M at 3.27%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 3.05%, and AstraZeneca at 2.54%.

overview.description: The Capital Group International Equity ETF (CGIE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in stocks of non-US companies. The objective centers on identifying companies believed to have the potential for growth. CGIE was launched on Sep 26, 2023 and is issued by Capital Group.

data.text: LOS ANGELES, Sept. 28, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Capital Group launched five active exchange-traded funds (ETFs) today on the New York Stock Exchange. This compelling lineup includes its first-ever multi-a...
